acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux CI runs `nix develop -c just direct-capture-preflight` or an equivalent Linux-only gate.
macOS CI is not made responsible for Linux/Nix direct-capture dependencies.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml leaves the macOS job unchanged; docs/DIRECT_CAPTURE_HELPER_PREFLIGHT.md states the split.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence records local `nix develop -c just direct-capture-preflight`, `nix flake check`, and `nix develop -c just check`.
No runtime capture, product QUIC, portal, capture-to-NVENC, zero-copy, cross-device, decode, render, presentation, or latency claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node wires a hosted Linux build/preflight gate only; live capture remains separate hardware evidence.
